hs_demux_mask
module hs_demux_mask #(
parameter 
integer 
Handshakes
 = 
2
)
(
hs_io.flw
flw_hs,
hs_io.ldr
ldr_hs[Handshakes],
input 
logic
 [Handshakes-1:0] 
mask_i
)

Use mask_i to connect flw_hs to one or more downstream ldr_hs handshakes.  Multiple bits set acts as a broadcast handshake.

mask_i is sampled on flw_hs.flag.init

Ports
flw_hs
hs_io.flw

Interface to demux

ldr_hs
hs_io.ldr ×[Handshakes]

array of handshakes, driven by flw_hs if their associated mask_i bit is set

mask_i
input logic [Handshakes-1:0]

configuration mask with each bit corresponding to a ldr_hs handshake at the same index

Parameters
Handshakes
parameter integer

The number of handshakes in the ldr_hs hs_io handshake array

Quinn Unger 01/July/2026
